description_for_human: Lightning-paid reasoning and decision intelligence. Pay per insight using Bitcoin Lightning. No subscriptions, no accounts, no KYC.
description_for_model: Lightning-paid reasoning and structured decision intelligence using the L402 protocol. The agent sends a request to /reason or /decision, receives a 402 response containing a Lightning invoice, pays the invoice, then retries the request with Authorization: L402 <payment_hash>:<preimage>.
